This project is at an early stage, feel free to apply whatever you think is the best approach and don't worry about following existing patterns.

Be comprehensive but concise and accurate when output, especially output for another AI agent. Less is more.

The role of this file is to describe common mistakes and confusion points that agent may encounter when performing workflows in this project. If you encounter something in the project that surprises you, please alert the developer working with you and propose a change to this file to help future agents avoid the same issue.
